positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_problem.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.

    rating_gt_four(hamden_plaza_subway)).

cnf(u20,negated_conjecture,
    take_out(hamden_plaza_subway)).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    ~yelp_recommended(sK0)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~rating_gt_four(X0) | yelp_recommended(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~take_out(sK0)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    ~many_negative_reviews(X0) | ~yelp_recommended(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    many_negative_reviews(sK0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~popular_local(X0) | rating_gt_four(X0)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    yelp_recommended(hamden_plaza_subway)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
